work_unit: fix TOCTOU race in episodic store tmp filename (audit-2026-07-02-006 M-001)
situation: Derived fix from deep audit audit-2026-07-02-006 finding M-001. _saveEpisodic uses write-to-tmp+rename pattern but tmp filename only includes PID. Concurrent processes sharing PID namespace (worker_threads, rapid fork/exec) could collide on same tmp path, causing silent data loss.
action: Added random suffix (${process.pid}-${rand}) to tmp path to eliminate collision risk. Single-file route-fix in server/memory/index.js.
outcome_evidence: Commit a183a6f on auto/opt-pc_agent-1782972172 pushed to origin. node -e require('./server/memory/index.js') syntax check passed in worktree.
next_suggestion: 派生下一个 pending fix: M-002 (image content-type magic byte validation in claude-pipeline.js). 之后 M-003 (multipart filename sanitization), L-001 (fail-fast unauthenticated client).
